items.claim: Anna Melesiano looks horrible in her older fight footage.
items.quote: I've seen some older clips and she just looks horrible.

items.claim: Diana Barbosa is more of a veteran than Anna Melesiano.
items.quote: I just feel like Barbosa is a bit more of a veteran
R.J. Harris is undefeated, I believe.

items.claim: Alvin Hines has a 7-1 record and lost his last fight.
items.quote: Alvin Hines is 7-1, only has one loss, but is coming is off his last fight.

items.claim: Alden Cora and Joshua Van have very similar, smooth boxing styles.
items.quote: I believe Korea is um Joshua Van's main training partner, I believe. And they fight very similar. Like their boxing style is very similar, very smooth.

items.claim: Steuart Nicole takes a lot of shots in his fights.
items.quote: Nicole's not even too bad, but like he takes a lot of shots, doesn't he?

items.claim: Alden Cora gains momentum as he lands his boxing combinations.
items.quote: I feel like Cory is someone who like gains momentum as he starts to land his boxing.

items.claim: Steuart Nicole will be forced into panic wrestling against Alden Cora.
items.quote: Nicole's probably going to need to wrestle, but it's going to be more panic wrestling and he's going to get stuffed

items.claim: Alden Cora has a height and reach advantage over Steuart Nicole.
items.quote: He's going to have the height advantage, the reach advantage, and just the overall skill advantage.

items.claim: Felipe Franco has a loss in the UFC and does not look good on tape.
items.quote: Felipe Franco does have a loss in the UFC. Um, Felipe Franco doesn't look too good from everything I've seen, though.
